mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_request(request_id, source_id, target_id, idempotent_key, status, version) VALUES(#{requestId}, #{sourceId}, #{targetId}, #{idempotentKey}, #{status}, #{version}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), version = friend_request.version + 1
mapper.select: SELECT request_id, source_id, target_id, idempotent_key, status, version, create_time FROM friend_request WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} AND status = 2
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friend_request WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND target_id = #{targetId}
